name: Puck
description: I find myself strangely drawn to this odd configuration of activity.

abilities.name: Puckish
abilities.description: Restores a portion of both its max health and max mana per incoming attack projectile disjointed. The restoration is more effective when disjointing incoming spell-based projectiles. Base Heal: 10. Max Health as Heal: 2%. Base Mana Restore: 10. Max Mana as Mana Restore: 2%. Spell Projectile Restore Factor: 3.5.

abilities.name: Illusory Orb
abilities.description: Sends out an illusory orb that floats in a straight path, damaging enemy units along the way. At any point, Puck may teleport to the current location of the orb using Ethereal Jaunt. Cast Range: 3000. Projectile Speed: 550. Travel Distance: 1950. Damage Radius: 225. Damage: 75/150/225/300 (115/190/265/340). Cooldown: 11/10/9/8. Mana Cost: 90/100/110/120.

abilities.name: Waning Rift
abilities.description: Teleports to the area-targeted location, deals damage, and silences enemy units within the radius. Cast Range: Global. Max Distance: 350 (700). Effect Radius: 400 (750). Damage: 60/120/180/240 (120/180/240/300). Silence Duration: 2/2.5/3/3.5 (3.25/3.75/4.25/4.75). Cooldown: 16/15/14/13 (13.5/12.5/11.5/10.5). Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Phase Shift
abilities.description: Imbues Puck's attacks with magical attack damage bonus. Max Channel Time: 1/1.75/2.5/3.25. Buff Linger Duration: 0.033. Instant Attack Radius: (550). Magical Attack Damage Bonus: (25). Cooldown: 8/7.5/7/6.5.

abilities.name: Dream Coil
abilities.description: Creates a coil of volatile magic that latches, damages and leashes onto enemy heroes. The coil snaps if any of the affected enemy heroes stretch the link by moving too far away, stunning and dealing additional damage. Cast Range: 750. Latch Radius: 375. First Damage: 175/250/325 (375/450/525). Coil Duration: 5/5.5/6. Break Distance: 600. Break Damage: 200/300/400 (400/500/600). Cooldown: 75 (60). Mana Cost: 125/175/225.
